original_image_tags: A faded, yellowed document page with extensive "bleed-through" from text on the reverse side, making the primary side difficult to read. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top. The bottom third of the page contains several overlapping stamps in blue, purple, and red ink, and some handwritten annotations.

elements.description: A single scanned page showing faint, reversed bleed-through text from the opposite side of the document. Multiple administrative stamps are visible, including 'FBI', 'REC'D MAIL-R/103', 'APR 21 12 28 PM '60', 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE FBI', 'APR 21 9 15 AM '60', 'COWSMAN', 'REC'D 50 APR 25 1960', and a red stamp labeled 'DEPT. OF DEFENSE INVESTIGATIVE RECORDS CENTER' with handwritten 'HILL'.
